notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Phillies challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Javier Sanoja reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Edmundo Sosa.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error

notableEvents.label: Leo Jiménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Leo Jiménez grounds into a double play, shortstop Trea Turner to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Jakob Marsee out at 2nd. Leo Jiménez out at 1st.
